case_name: Alice Corp. v. CLS Bank International
quoted_holding: an abstract idea does not become patent eligible merely by reciting a generic computer
an inventor under the Patent Act must be a natural person

case_name: Recentive Analytics, Inc. v. Fox Corp.
quoted_holding: applying generic machine learning to a new data environment is patent eligible under section 101

case_name: Synapse AI, Inc. v. Cortex Labs, Inc.
quoted_holding: training a neural network on proprietary data is presumptively patent eligible
